name: skillgate
description: AI agent skill supply-chain security scanner. Runs 6 parallel static scanners (policy, dangerous-commands, IOC, dependencies, injection, YARA) plus an optional L2 dynamic sandbox. Prevents malicious skills from entering your agent's runtime.
author: Rong <skillgate@openclaw.ai>

permissions.subprocess: local Python 3 + bash scripts only (no external downloads)

architecture.design: 6-scanner parallel pipeline: policy, dangerous-commands, IOC, dependencies, injection, YARA

disclaimers: Scanning results do not guarantee zero risk.
This tool does not replace professional security audits.
Provided AS IS under MIT License — no warranty expressed or implied.
